textByHashes.e4a156680c8cd536ddba21aff78b84be46443d9a: Guards! Please escort this outlander to the docks. She is not welcome in my court.
textByHashes.0aaed5f91b539ee88125459fa9a2584dd476af05: Do you have me confused with the King of Jatizso? Guards!
textByHashes.d66085119b30569459fb8458e839e9cc99700c0e: Ah! A fool. Excellent. The last entertainer I had was not up to standard.
textByHashes.0c5fdc0a4ffd6faaff17d4643334ab57e962d95d: HA HA HA! Now that's funny.
textByHashes.1f43dfe04d8b2b210eb9b8706581963290fa58a5: Mm? Oh yes of course...bag of ferrets eh? [laugh]!
textByHashes.c39edae85a4e4e9072c2df45928552c2e136a03e: Well, new Jester! This had better be good.
textByHashes.777d323bdeb369d05ad6c66c7ea91439d3803653: If you can amuse or delight me at all, you'll be doing much better than the last one.
textByHashes.b704e1ae146eb46f8160c4012be4738610a2698a: Bah, if he'd been a decent juggler, he could have juggled the battleaxe, flaming torches, and greased pigs we threw at him.
textByHashes.34258e771b061894b7fb243cb2bfbfda697f7364: Every good performance deserves a reprise.
textByHashes.1836659c7a20e534931acc44a18f1319b8af9e82: Useless fool! Return when you routine is more polished!
textByHashes.f76bcbadd6a7ed48720479e4f9ecd703b0da5b90: Well, thank you, that was much better than the last jester.
textByHashes.b6cbedc0f8d29aeb6401bbe5db25549f55a9a115: Go away! I'm busy right now with important matters of state.
textByHashes.967afc5b2921662d3b5b7087c0593f75616dcad6: Ah, jester. I am not currently in need of jest.
textByHashes.20488e5afc77d558364133aad09933d793b48599: Right now I need a Champion, not a jester.
textByHashes.5a3b9950d11213ede024934898277842003a67a5: Ha! Fortunately for you he also has a sense of humour.
textByHashes.a1fb6be4bb383f3281b6972e0264a57e9ec99dce: Hmmmm. Guard! Who is this outlander who has been brought before me?
textByHashes.22ad7a35c1303d154e22acbb559db27ff2be0d14: You jest! He doesn't look that impressive to me.
textByHashes.824f1ab689bfdb6b165c50a1638382c82155ddf7: You jest! She doesn't look that impressive to me.
textByHashes.181ff4b5ca9aee964cdc25d57a2e5d8a582fe74a: Well, I have sought an audience with you for several days now.
textByHashes.d20b5e56560fa66ee09862f797ff8302cc2e8569: I have need for a courageous and valiant individual.
textByHashes.ce0f00435ffd962a630fd52c02d50767ee96bb36: One who will not flee at the sight of jest a few trolls.
textByHashes.ce7fe9eac0045c4857942fea2c8f43fe0a19e5f2: Ha! Well said! However, this is no jesting matter. Although a Fremennik name goes a great way towards gaining my trust, I must ask that you prove your loyalty to me and my kinsfolk.
textByHashes.1e2afe32601f6533cb483d285dcb219afcdeb8cc: Trust me Fridleif, I think in this case it is necessary. Anyway, there are many tasks that need to be done. Some of them are menial, and needs to show me that he can handle these as well as the ones that
textByHashes.ae8df12f24f90c6790ce36f751d35cbe413b5c71: Trust me Fridleif, I think in this case it is necessary. Anyway, there are many tasks that need to be done. Some of them are menial, and needs to show me that she can handle these as well as the ones that
textByHashes.fa804fae12c0afb50dae97b63035b06ba0af88cb: simply require bravery. We on Neitiznot are warriors, but we are not just warriors.
textByHashes.89c1e29be62f57f2ee968140e6bbded277a9ed4b: Well then, , are you willing to assist my engineer?
textByHashes.c9cd3ee900aadd4cf0c6ff0d031ce25cecd0baed: Of course not. Neitiznot rope is the best. Real men use yak rope. You need to make the rope yourself.
textByHashes.26bff148c58c1467def8d77c9de1eb4d6426af9d: Well yes, of course it is. We supply rope to all of the rope traders in Gielinor. Its an excellent business.
textByHashes.8fd4c5ac109936a39026a72242888accc08366c7: Anyway, once you have obtained the rope we shall speak more about the quest I have for you. So get a move on!
textByHashes.7804bbcbcd5812496a12c1eacb8cc95bb260dc90: Bank? Why do you need to go to a bank? Neitiznot is the home of quality rope. The hairs of the local yak have the perfect combination of strength and hardiness required from modern rope. Yak rope is stronger and
textByHashes.19c0701b24aa9a7ba7b1b2cd3ab1ecf612f7b0bd: Wool? Wool? What a load of old rope. Wool would make awful rope - its far too soft and it would soak up the water too easily.
textByHashes.ae84b1d97d014dfd43c6122963afc907e1deae0f: Ned? I don't know anything about Ned. I do know we make regular trades with someone in that area. We send them rope, and we get wool in return.
textByHashes.479780fb425f59409ad7f588390a497a0318e6e9: I suppose so. You should really try to make some rope yourself though. Fighting the dual challenges of the yak's hooves and its smell is part of becoming a man over here.
textByHashes.548dd45835e230e6065b4a671c321f9efbd38e7d: A note? How do you fix a bridge with a note? Go bring me some real rope.
textByHashes.ef1e9955cd9ef65b5b92cf552a6a980bb4526573: Do you normally carry all that rope around with you?
textByHashes.89f8bc1380da00bd5fdc8e4b74d8a2993dfe6e77: Are you some kind of seer?
textByHashes.2f01e5bc5f1bf74f81f266a43082aa8f40a82518: Hey! You're not some sort of witch are you? Maybe I have trusted you too much.
textByHashes.e34443412ca300d7046b3f10d3de68dd62f49814: You have come to the home of all rope to sell us...rope. What a load of old rope (ahem).
textByHashes.ad5e38890a57e8b74607631c6798a824f4c3a28b: Alright then. Let's have a look at his rope then.
textByHashes.9e3c5e936423e28a87fa34afbd732b8318f604e2: Hello again. Do you have the eight pieces of rope that Thakkrad asked you for?th
textByHashes.8b3c1bf4c98518f1383d52c3679db3b839714e33: You can collect pieces of hair from the yaks that roam our isle, then spin it into rope.
textByHashes.6257f977f751fe38e35a5e5e4e6e5289bcd71289: There is a spinning wheel in the south-east of the village.
textByHashes.81b55da8988c8a2164fe1737d0648956f0fc51d5: Hello again. Do you have the eight pieces of rope that Thakkrad asked you for?
textByHashes.2a8dc17f1b1ecbc6c8d39e4e9f7eaf245eca285c: Thakkrad! Please reward for his efforts.
textByHashes.eecf5ddf3c24fd565796eaf5334c4aa6fefe20fe: Thakkrad! Please reward for her efforts.
textByHashes.456e03bad6ba0ac775aedee5f108d69deccaca46: My, you are both impertinent and impatient. I have two more tasks for you before I am willing to tell you the full details.
textByHashes.831655f634b6ccf9a68a7905150b1573ed8c0616: Ah, a bit more respect. That's better.
textByHashes.00b9cecc97fec20a1ab44c83c79585c4add19e4d: I shall speak with you again once you have prepared these split logs.
textByHashes.5d42c86f9d72d7ca2f5fdd525541d655e0141573: Hello again; do you have the eight split logs that Thakkrad asked you to make?
textByHashes.66fd2b4b16707e084e4d7789d5bb165c091fa120: You must fell eight arctic pine then split the logs in two with an axe.
textByHashes.0024693348340841b04cd67f22e1507450407d89: has returned with the split logs you asked for. Please reward him for his efforts.
textByHashes.e674483d51aef2d55ea86c18871a361ccdddbce0: has returned with the split logs you asked for. Please reward her for his efforts.
textByHashes.5b4ee795e693c315e87ea05119cf326715e368c2: has returned with the split logs you asked for. Please reward him for her efforts.
textByHashes.3086d6ec37044c17596f151477e7d06ba3868048: has returned with the split logs you asked for. Please reward her for her efforts.
textByHashes.06e7a4f5c14438cb1cc7f7cb84c853f4ccd8523b: Once this is complete I shall explain the quest I have for you.
textByHashes.518a984cd06a5d577519ea1c6ab7d8582fd6acf2: Thakkrad, could you explain what needs doing next?
textByHashes.8bdce7b4e92291d18628df581cfdf53f277a1d42: I shall speak with you again once you have repaired the bridges.
textByHashes.f14a76c01fbf3fc0aea51f9f3d5bb600acb67aee: Ho there! have you repaired both bridges for my engineer?
textByHashes.5862f975147646ce574289916f1eca571488830a: Thakkrad? Can you fill in the details?
textByHashes.fd2b454210b218776de3a235323d6cd467a2eed2: Excellent. We are one step closer to putting my plan into action.
textByHashes.f4f5b05c130f98b0c1131b8ff0421fd167d72fb7: Now that the bridges are repaired I feel I can tell you of our plans.
textByHashes.942457bc2026a32b53e60940da49c94d22ed7006: First, I shall have my engineer reward you for you efforts.
textByHashes.3d8c9d2fb9c93c6ff4cb1947ef972506d3e7c4a8: has repaired both bridges. Please reward him for his efforts, Thakkrad.
textByHashes.9b934223785e4ef5488c824b60c51837df130c1e: has repaired both bridges. Please reward her for his efforts, Thakkrad.
textByHashes.698c0b07ebb859343054fcc8adcd8cac32768314: has repaired both bridges. Please reward him for her efforts, Thakkrad.
textByHashes.8713d23735db75ed936bf1b420106ad29cd1eb6e: has repaired both bridges. Please reward her for her efforts, Thakkrad.
textByHashes.6cd9a02bf19adc3aa448d8efb55aa0597916429a: Long ago, the ancestors of this isle fought heroically against the troll menace upon these isles.
textByHashes.3057e48d58e2bd7318d5b81bbb922bf90cd87191: But, for the last few generations, we have been preoccupied with fighting our neighbours on Jatizso.
textByHashes.caf4cd4a3f8b416f0f79d04133d430a771a9c0f8: In our complacency, the trolls have grown in number and strength and have become increasingly brazen in their raids, attacking our kinsfolk, stealing and destroying our belongings. Now the time has come for
textByHashes.5858df363ac426c524f668540aa53187b2bc1ff4: us to drive the trolls from this isle. We must defeat their leader, the foul Troll King.
textByHashes.3d4e19d624751ea9327dce5915493053e49d6d34: Although I am confident we will be victorious, I am a cautious man.
textByHashes.25ba8bc38402cea6fea5cd2b8b4b3de9c8092f30: We have suffered for many generations and the blood of our ancestors grows weak.
textByHashes.010858ef5c9e9390a7af47d802d11919d52a5dc7: But now, in this time of prosperity, Fridleif has recruited the bravest Fremennik warriors from far and wide to win back our honour.
textByHashes.8a3b489f2afe0ff5cd94161e5b93b0c924fb4251: Now that you have proven your loyalty, I offer you the honour of leading my forces into battle.
textByHashes.9115750a202470cbafbd3366c291ab8a3ed3caee: Excellent! Once Fridleif's militia arrive and are fully equipped we shall head north into the troll caves.
textByHashes.a0c26198248de5979b6efa986f736015fb05404e: I have one last concern. I suspect that King Sorvott may have some idea that we intend to make this raid.
textByHashes.976b060b112d2536e2f89b287c3caf80f7de7779: If he and his men were willing to aid us in this task then that would not be a problem, however I suspect that Sorvott will see our actions and misinterpret them. He may well attempt to prevent us. I need to know the
textByHashes.2c281ae5dda77d2b36df6144c8585ebbd981a240: extent of his knowledge so that I may plan. , I suspect that you may be able to help us here. I find underhand methods distasteful, however I ask you to go to Jatizso and find the King's plans by whatever means
textByHashes.f86cc97a2466eb6963b1c8653be17cbaedcbe91b: Do you need anything from me to help you?
textByHashes.49578bd9feb04cdc56d7b9fd867d317ffaf782ca: Excellent. Then make your way with haste.
textByHashes.8350792be8030e27be3def4c2b0881842bdaa810: My militia are still gathering in Rellekka. Have you found out anything about Jatizso's plans yet?
textByHashes.bc81ba92cfc8a6329194d363498ce4eec205dc5d: Well then, you'd better get on with it.
textByHashes.85ab6c1d46eb18852931de27ed5d89cc326e58f9: Ah, good timing. I was just thinking I needed a bit of light entertainment.
textByHashes.65537c8f70db6b5b96cca2c2617434ba59dc8f31: Ah, back again. I hope you've got a new act.
textByHashes.1bbc1c7b9eafac6792f6b95152e8f36802fb6033: When you said you had a new act you were lying weren't you?
textByHashes.585733e3326d600979b1e38ab2d3f66d79815487: No, no, no, your old act is fine. I've had more than enough Beowulf. My tutor made me study that tale again and again.
textByHashes.3d84dd3bea3d1404d34e1d985b9918895e0c7b19: Get on with it! The more slapstick, the better.
textByHashes.6fd51f5bf703b9cbb2f984832183792da111f926: My militia are en route from Rellekka. Have you found out anything about Jatizso's plans yet?
textByHashes.e4792592abfaa1830d0c191a06cae706dbe1864f: It would bring great shame upon my family to break the truce that was signed between King Sorvott III and my father.
textByHashes.e08cc6ba47d03cfa8a24e38b1c617493464e8cb6: Well, if he thinks the folk of Neitiznot can be intimidated by his threats, he best be ready to accept defeat.
textByHashes.581355687992cf98cb9d331d2789fb6d2f09c491: We have no time to lose. Fridleif, please guide through the traditions laid down by our ancestors.
textByHashes.c9674b6f6652fd23722466121b32f4efe93d8399: Once you have completed these rites I shall appoint you as head of my raiding party.
textByHashes.37ff9d5cf98711d3703224f1000299f1db6c4813: Thakkrad? Explain to what she needs to do again.
textByHashes.02b1b22a61d1d18a98d906cb603f47aed2bda5e8: I see you have made some of the armour. Do you need assistance with the other part?
textByHashes.eb8b1bb4ea7bb16d3c21b48653d22d57481282b4: Have you completed your suit of yak armour?
textByHashes.4eaeb104e6964cacda2c78b4e3814308707a62b3: Excellent news. Now you have just one more item to craft and I can appoint you as leader of my warband; then you may lead our raid against the trolls.
textByHashes.bab5b498fdc09067bd784ab8e32fbed8b2af2b4c: The final piece of traditional arms is a large Fremennik round shield.
textByHashes.4614f001d9d9b7064c9b975519efcede54b803f2: With this you will be able to deflect the large rocks that some of the trolls like to throw at you.
textByHashes.f0a3450e3afe6a603f267679ae2e731b71940151: Have you completed the final piece of your Fremennik garb?
textByHashes.4b8ab34e74beeafb9191a1e3d25c98f2bcb34789: There is little more for me to say. You have proven your worth to my kinsmen and I, but I must continue with the traditions so...
textByHashes.c94660ba2ad2b74cd770b86bbab20f9064c8598b: Do you, , solemnly swear to uphold the virtues of courage and honour?
textByHashes.ff61dde7f355afa431d434bcd92a3797e66862f5: I hearby appoint as Champion of Neitiznot.
textByHashes.5cb76f6dd39d3644f01459bd2d9bda0b4d293f3d: You have made our township very proud today. We hope you continue to match up to our hopes in the quest which we have for you.
textByHashes.bc1d58c546f03d356bc85522cecdcff7ba41c9e1: As my kinsmen have mentioned, there is a foul beast dwelling in the caves on the northernmost isle.
textByHashes.e08089c08e2d860e8d6c588610d732f56c92af20: We ask that you lead our militia against this brute and return with the beast's head as proof of your heroism.
textByHashes.35dfbb556b3daeaf517d1a7e737d9432bc97d204: I thank you for bringing me this trophy, , you have done much to bring honour to this isle.
textByHashes.c21b3fcb916ac787b39950e6b1d4df4f5d4b73f4: As a mark of my gratitude for slaying my nemesis, the foul Troll King, I offer you my helm.
textByHashes.b0b3928532b6a93013fcc0483ad5c9f4e1c66274: It makes me proud to know that the helm of my ancestors will be worn in battle.
textByHashes.713c7e57e1e4ead8fe2d408ff60d09b6f9ccef6d: I thank you on behalf of all my Kinsmen, .
textByHashes.0351ecdc4beb97bce0e0840ec807591db6c79d45: Thakkrad, I believe you have finished repairing the remaining bridge.
textByHashes.8435f631407d71d11b541fc5f75cc290ca39ad7d: Ah, so that is how we compete with the mineral wealth of Jatizso.
textByHashes.84d8ac9ae08b27d8ed44ca918d1bdf22639acfb1: Indeed, the wealth of these isles may not be spread evenly, but we certainly make the most of what we have.
textByHashes.8e7a233dba16b4ff842c33867694a6771ce9113c: My next task is to make peace with the King of Jatizso.
textByHashes.d21b36ee44d4738b96c744df1865a64d6cae6799: Ah, I see you too have angered King Sorvott IV.
textByHashes.bfca9d6d47f94a6e0119e14d917be4e718e7ae0e: Not to worry, I have my ways of pacifying the King.
textByHashes.804890612c529a3ee66b57395406a00759888483: I am proud that the helm of my ancestors will be worn in battle. I thank you on behalf of all my kinsmen, .
textByHashes.66ca2bc8cc87cff35169ff8682cbbe1765a4d47f: What, the priceless heirloom that I gave to you as a sign of my trust and gratitude?
textByHashes.7e2ae3fc8325ff8df1e47d2f00616f96d769b0c7: It's a good job I have alert and loyal men who notice when such a precious item is left laying around, and who pick it up.
textByHashes.85d5b076a185f8207c2d2df15fb1deb33fea99c3: I'm afraid I'm going to have to charge you a 50,000 coin handling cost.
textByHashes.a66d4cc2f740129df3068aa20cdc09563a25ee8a: Well, yes, I do. But I'm going to have to charge you 50,000 coins - these are precious, you know!
textByHashes.38b0c0b602ee81e0479070cb38d06d6137f3814d: Well, come back when you do.
textByHashes.4334b975d43dfbff30996ff5a80c4e095f0bf157: Well, come back when you can.
